task_completion.visual_evidence: A created Credit Note screen in Manager.io showing Alfreds Futterkiste, linked to invoice INV-A003, with a total amount of $60.00.

integrity.description: Agent used the Manager.io web interface to perform actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation and form submission within the Manager.io web application (http://localhost:8080), rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not mock up the answers in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The credit notes, receipt allocations, and reports are viewed inside the actual accounting software interface, not written in a text file.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely loaded the Aged Receivables report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Aged Receivables report screen shows the standard Manager.io report layout and UI elements, rather than a manually typed summary.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Alfreds Futterkiste requires a full credit note of $600.00 for invoice INV-A002 and a partial credit note of $60.00 for invoice INV-A003. Ernst Handel requires allocating an existing $450.00 receipt to invoice INV-E002. Ernst Handel also has a background invoice INV-E001 for $1200.00 which should remain unaffected. The pass threshold for the task is 65/100.
